pageDescription: Calculate body fat percentage using various methods including BMI method, U.S. Navy method, and other scientific approaches

bmi.title: BMI Method
bmi.description: Uses BMI and age to estimate body fat percentage

usNavy.title: U.S. Navy Method
usNavy.description: Uses circumference measurements for more accurate results

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides estimates only and is not a diagnostic tool
criticalWarningsList.individualVariation: Body fat percentage varies based on many individual factors

importantNotesList: Different methods may produce different results
Body fat percentage is just one measure of health
Consult healthcare professionals for accurate body composition analysis
Regular exercise and balanced nutrition are important for healthy body composition

messages.enterMeasurements: Enter your measurements to calculate your body fat percentage
messages.bodyFatResult: Your estimated body fat percentage is {percentage}%
messages.ageWarning: Body fat calculations may vary for different age groups

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides estimates based on mathematical formulas and should not be used as a substitute for professional body composition analysis. Individual results may vary based on factors not accounted for in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Consult a Healthcare Professional
seekHelp.content: For accurate body composition analysis and personalized health advice, please consult with a healthcare professional or certified fitness trainer who can provide guidance based on your complete health history and individual circumstances.

errors.heightCm: Please enter valid height in cm
errors.waist: Please enter a valid waist measurement
errors.neck: Please enter a valid neck measurement
errors.hip: Please enter a valid hip measurement

tooltips.hip: Measure at the widest point (women only)
